demographics.living_situation: lives independently; adult child present tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I cannot feel my feet at all, I keep stumbling like I am drunk, and my tongue is burning so badly I cannot eat.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I had a fall tonight and I'm on the floor — I can't feel my feet or keep my balance, and my adult child is worried because I've been so forgetful and worn out lately.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness has crept up over about 8 months; the numbness in the feet started around 3 months ago; the fall and the bad unsteadiness happened tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: months, getting steadily worse, with a sudden bad patch tonight
symptom_narrative.character: dead, numb feet with pins and needles; legs feel like they don't belong to me; a burning, raw tongue; deep tiredness with no energy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel completely wiped out, my balance is gone and I'm frightened I'll fall again
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both feet and legs up to about the knees, and my tongue and mouth
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time now and slowly worse; much worse tonight when I tried to walk
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or lying still; keeping the lights on so I can watch my feet helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to walk, and closing my eyes or the dark — I lose my balance completely
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: burning sore tongue so I can't eat properly, feeling faint and breathless when I do too much, and my adult child says my memory has got much worse
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — it has only built up over the last several months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand or walk safely on my own; I'm stuck on the floor and too unsteady to get up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally kept well until this last year; no diabetes or nerve problems that I know of

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medicines and no vitamins or supplements at all

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I have been a strict vegan for over forty years and I have never taken any vitamin supplements
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently; my adult child came over and is with me tonight and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: tongue looks smooth, very red and shiny
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen on a phone camera, not examined

objective_data_offered.value: she looks very pale and a bit yellowish in the skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: adult child's naked-eye impression under home lighting

objective_data_offered.value: she is sitting on the floor and can't get up or stand steadily; loses balance completely if she shuts her eyes
she went down slowly onto the carpet and did not hit her head; no obvious deformity or bleeding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: family account, not a clinical injury assessment
